zone_section_start.title_label_raw: R-2AM ZONE: GENERAL RESIDENTIAL CONVERSION ZONE

zone_section_end_before.title_label_raw: R-3 ZONE: GENERAL RESIDENTIAL AND LOW-RISE APARTMENT

zone_class_reference.summary: R-2AM is an established class of use zone.

permitted_uses.use_name: R-1, R-2, R-2P and R-2T uses

conditions: ground area covered by the addition must not be greater than the area covered by the existing building
lot coverage must not be greater than 40 percent

permitted_uses.use_name: uses accessory to any of the foregoing uses

prohibitions.summary: No development for any purpose other than one or more uses in 28BA(1).
No land or building use for any purpose other than one or more uses in 28BA(1).

incorporated_use_requirements.summary: No billboard or sign except those permitted in R-1 Zones or in accordance with Section 30 below.

controls.condition_text: outer side of street curve may reduce minimum to 30 feet

conditions: otherwise comply with the requirements of the R-1 zone

incorporated_use_requirements.summary: Buildings erected, altered or used for R-2, R-2P or R-2T uses in an R-2AM Zone shall comply with the requirements of their respective zones.

conditions: maximum height of additions shall be 35 feet
under no circumstances shall a permitted addition exceed the established height of the existing building
applies to an apartment with a minimum of 5 units and a maximum of 14 units
maximum height of additions shall be three storeys
under no circumstances shall a permitted addition exceed the established height of the existing building

incorporated_use_requirements.summary: Additions and structural changes to existing buildings are not permitted on any front or side portion of a building facing a street and are limited to the rear and rear two-thirds of the side of the building.

special_infill_conditions.summary: The city may permit infill development otherwise not permitted under the by-law if the following special conditions are satisfied.

conditions.condition_text: if the area of ground covered by an existing building is less than 60 percent of the average area of ground covered by existing residential buildings in the immediate neighbourhood
conditions.result_text: the total area of ground covered by the existing building may be increased to twice the average area of ground covered by existing residential buildings in the immediate neighbourhood, provided that the lot coverage does not exceed 40 percent

conditions.condition_text: if the existing building setback is greater than half the lot depth
conditions.result_text: additions may be constructed to the front of an existing building as outlined in Section 43AF

conditions.condition_text: if an existing building on a corner lot is greater in height at the front of the building than at the rear of the building
conditions.result_text: additions to the top rear portion of the building may be constructed provided the addition does not exceed the height of the front of the building or a maximum height of three storeys

controls.condition_text: if the building is located at mid-block
controls.definition_text: all existing residential buildings located on the four lots on each side, the lots in the rear which share the same lot line, and the corresponding lots on the opposite side of the street

controls.condition_text: if the building is located on a corner lot
controls.definition_text: all existing residential buildings located on the four lots immediately adjacent, the lots in the rear which share the same lot line, and the corresponding lots on the opposite side of the abutting streets

special_infill_conditions.summary: The applicant must provide drawings, figures, calculations and other information deemed necessary by the city to demonstrate that the building is anomalous and deserves consideration under this section.

use_specific_standards.summary: R-2AM uses permitted in the R-3, C-2A and C-2B Zones shall comply with the requirements of the R-2AM Zone except Section 28BE.

use_specific_standards.use_name: existing 21 unit apartment at 9 and 11 Alma Crescent
conditions: notwithstanding Section 28BA(1), the property at civic number 9 Alma Crescent may be consolidated with 11 Alma Crescent
the existing 21 unit apartment is recognized as a permitted use
the use must comply with all requirements of the R-3 Zone
